Summaryinfo.ReportTitle: Alpha Codes and Internet CCTLDs by Country

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition:
Local StringVar DotCode := {countries_all_iso.internet_cctld};
If Length(DotCode) = 0 Then "-" Else DotCode ;

TextObject.Name: Text7
TextObject.Text: Alpha Codes and Internet CCTLDs by Country

SectionAreaConditionFormulas.BackgroundColor: select RecordNumber mod 2 case 0: crYellow case 1: crLime
